epic.name: User Reviews
epic.epicSummary: Verified-buyer product reviews as a storefront feature, backed by a standalone, engine-agnostic reviews service (own Postgres) consumed via the ReviewProvider contract over HTTP; standalone moderation admin; 'fail-alive' auto-publish default.
epic.reference: epics/epic-user-reviews.json + ADR-0001 Standalone Reviews Service with a Stateless Storefront

conventions.storyPoints: Fibonacci (1,2,3,5,8); Jira story-points custom field ID varies per instance — map on import
conventions.dependsOn: Jira issue links of type 'Blocks' (listed task must finish first)

labels_glossary.backend: reviews service, provider, HTTP API, webhook, cron
labels_glossary.frontend: Next.js storefront UI and Server Actions
labels_glossary.config: env schema, feature flags, documented settings

tasks.summary: Add Review domain objects to @nimara/domain
tasks.description: Review, Rating, ReviewAggregate (avg + count + star distribution), ReviewModerationStatus, and an optional vendorRef. Pure types/objects, no framework or API deps (packages/domain/src/objects). Product object gains no review fields — reviews stay a separate concern.

tasks.summary: Define ReviewsService contract + use-cases in @nimara/infrastructure
tasks.description: packages/infrastructure/src/reviews: types.ts (ReviewsService — the ReviewProvider contract) + backend-agnostic use-cases (getProductReviews, getAggregate, submitReview, reportReview). Modelled on store/types.ts. Kept DB/engine-agnostic so a SaaS adapter can slot in later.

tasks.summary: Register getReviewsService() in ServiceRegistry + storefront lazy-loader
tasks.description: Add getReviewsService() to ServiceRegistry (packages/infrastructure/src/types.ts), create apps/storefront/src/services/lazy-loaders/reviews.ts, and wire it into services/registry.ts — same pattern as search/cms/store.

tasks.summary: Add reviews feature flags to storefront env schema
tasks.description: NEXT_PUBLIC_REVIEWS_ENABLED (boolean transform, pattern of NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_ENABLED) and NEXT_PUBLIC_REVIEWS_API_URL in apps/storefront/src/envs/client.ts + .env.example. Feature is fully off by default.

tasks.summary: Scaffold apps/reviews standalone app with config + auth baseline
tasks.description: New Next.js app modelled on apps/marketplace: src/lib/config.ts (zod envSchema + getEnv), auth baseline for the moderation panel, deploy config. Auth/nav/layout isolated so it can later be lifted into a general operator console.

tasks.summary: Set up Drizzle + Postgres in apps/reviews (feature-gated on DATABASE_URL)
tasks.description: drizzle.config.ts, db client (node-postgres Pool, lazy), getReviewsDb() returning null when DATABASE_URL is unset — mirrors the ledger getLedgerDb() precedent so the DB stays optional/feature-gated.

tasks.summary: Design reviews DB schema + initial migration
tasks.description: Tables: reviews (rating, comment, status, product ref, order ref, author, optional vendor_ref), review_reports, pending_invitations (due_at, window_end, sent), moderation_audit. pgEnum for status; $inferSelect/$inferInsert types; unique constraint enforcing one review per product per order. Conventions per ledger/db/schema.ts.

tasks.summary: Spike: sanity-check ReviewProvider contract against a real SaaS review API
tasks.description: Map the ReviewsService contract onto a real API-first SaaS (Judge.me / Reviews.io) on paper — no adapter built. Goal: confirm the contract leaks no local-DB assumptions, so the provider-swap claim holds even though v1 ships only the default. Timeboxed to 2 days.

tasks.summary: Implement repository layer over the reviews schema
tasks.description: Typed repository (create/read/update review, insert report, insert audit, upsert pending_invitation) over Drizzle — pattern of apps/marketplace ledger/repository.ts. Single component with direct storage access.

tasks.summary: Implement verified-purchase eligibility
tasks.description: A review is accepted only when the customer has a fully fulfilled order containing the product; enforce one review per product per order. Fulfillment/order facts read from Saleor. Rejections return a clear reason.

tasks.summary: Implement the default ReviewsService provider with both moderation modes
tasks.description: Default (Nimara-owned) implementation of submit/read/report. Auto-publish with post-moderation (default) and pre-moderation (nothing public before approval) as a single config switch. Reporting a published review returns it to the queue without deleting it. Satisfies the ReviewsService contract.

tasks.summary: Implement rating aggregation (per-product and per-vendor)
tasks.description: Average rating, review count, and star distribution computed per product; aggregates can also group by vendor_ref (schema readiness for future per-vendor ratings — no marketplace UX here).

tasks.summary: Expose the reviews HTTP API on apps/reviews
tasks.description: Narrow endpoints: read published reviews + aggregates, submit review, report review. Header-based Saleor-domain verification, following the payment-intent route contract. This is the single seam the storefront calls.

tasks.summary: Implement storefront ReviewsService HTTP-client provider with caching
tasks.description: Default storefront provider is an HTTP client to apps/reviews (analogous to the GraphQL-client marketplace provider). Reads cached via Next revalidate/tags (like product reads); writes uncached. Consumed only through getReviewsService().

tasks.summary: Add ORDER_FULFILLED webhook to the Saleor manifest + handler
tasks.description: Register ORDER_FULFILLED (async) in the manifest and implement the handler in apps/reviews, modelled on the order-paid handler. This event is not yet subscribed anywhere and is the trigger for the review invitation.

tasks.summary: Implement JWKS webhook signature verification
tasks.description: Verify the Saleor webhook signature via JWKS (jose), closing the existing '// TODO: Verify webhook signature' gap. Reject unverified deliveries.

tasks.summary: On fulfillment, enqueue a pending invitation
tasks.description: The ORDER_FULFILLED handler writes a pending_invitation row per eligible product with due_at = fulfilled_at + configured delay and window_end = fulfilled_at + configured window. Idempotent on re-delivery.

tasks.summary: Build the invitation email template + sender
tasks.description: React Email template + sender reusing the marketplace nodemailer/React Email pattern. Introduce a thin, pluggable email-provider seam (default SMTP). Template is customizable per the epic; the invitation is the only notification in v1.

tasks.summary: Scheduled cron route to send due invitations
tasks.description: A scheduled route (e.g. Vercel Cron) polls pending_invitations for due_at <= now AND not sent, sends the invitation, and marks it sent. No queue/Redis. Delay (default 3 days) and window (default 30 days) configurable.

tasks.summary: Replace the placeholder product-reviews component with real data
tasks.description: Swap the hardcoded product-reviews.tsx for data via getReviewsService(), and wire reviews into the standard and marketplace PDP views (currently only the custom PDP renders reviews). Read within the shared product provider.

tasks.summary: PDP reviews UI: average, count, paginated list, star-rating filter
tasks.description: Product page shows average rating, review count, a paginated list of published reviews, and filtering by star rating. Composable/themeable components.

tasks.summary: Show rating + count on product cards
tasks.description: Average rating and review count on product cards across catalog and discovery surfaces (search-product-card / product-list / home-page grids). Aggregates fetched via getReviewsService().

tasks.summary: Review submission form (verified buyers only)
tasks.description: 1-5 star rating + comment form as a Server Action, available only to eligible verified buyers; on success shows immediately in auto-publish mode. Clear messaging when not eligible or already reviewed.

tasks.summary: 'My reviews' in the customer account
tasks.description: Account section listing the customer's own reviews (per the user story 'browse my reviews').

tasks.summary: Report-a-review action on the product page
tasks.description: Shopper can report a published review as inappropriate; the review returns to the moderation queue without being deleted.

tasks.summary: Add Review / AggregateRating structured data to the PDP
tasks.description: Emit schema.org Review + AggregateRating structured data for published reviews on the product page for SEO.

tasks.summary: Moderation queue (pending / reported) with filtering
tasks.description: Queue view in apps/reviews showing pending (pre-moderation) and reported reviews, filterable by rating and product.

tasks.summary: Approve / reject / unpublish actions
tasks.description: Moderator can approve, reject, and unpublish reviews; unpublish takes effect immediately on the storefront (cache invalidation).

tasks.summary: Bulk actions on the moderation queue
tasks.description: Select-many and apply approve/reject/unpublish in bulk.

tasks.summary: Moderation audit trail
tasks.description: Every moderation action (approve/reject/unpublish/report resolution) is recorded in moderation_audit with actor, action, target, timestamp.

tasks.summary: Queue-size visibility for pre-moderation stores
tasks.description: Surface pending-queue size (indicator/alert) so a store that opts into pre-moderation notices an unstaffed queue before it silently kills the feature. Mitigates the epic risk.

tasks.summary: Per-product rating summaries for store admin
tasks.description: Admin view of rating summaries per product so operators can spot catalog quality issues.

tasks.summary: GDPR: anonymize reviews on account deletion
tasks.description: On customer account deletion, detach the author (author_id -> null, name -> 'Anonymous') while keeping the review content, rating, and aggregates. Documented data-handling policy.

tasks.summary: Zero-to-Deploy absorption of the reviews DB
tasks.description: Ensure migrations run invisibly in the deploy path and the whole feature is inert when DATABASE_URL / NEXT_PUBLIC_REVIEWS_ENABLED are unset — the stateless storefront deploy story is unchanged with reviews off. Deploy docs updated.

tasks.summary: Configuration + documentation
tasks.description: Document enable/disable, moderation mode, invitation delay, review window, and invitation-template customization — all via environment/code, not hidden in UIs.

tasks.summary: E2E tests for the full reviews loop
tasks.description: apps/automated-tests: order fulfilled -> invitation (cron) -> submit -> auto-publish -> visible on PDP + card -> report -> back to queue -> unpublish -> gone. Pre-moderation variant: submit -> hidden -> approve -> visible. Flag-off variant: storefront runs with no DB and no reviews.

tasks.summary: Contract-boundary check
tasks.description: Verify the storefront reads/writes reviews exclusively via getReviewsService() and no component reaches review storage directly — the provider-swap guarantee. Lint/test guard.
